positive: A stylized, high-contrast graphic illustration of a majestic mountain lion (cougar) in a powerful, confident pose, viewed in a dynamic profile silhouette against a vibrant, minimalist sunset gradient background of deep indigo, burnt orange, and golden yellow. The cat should be drawn with clean, bold lines and strong negative space, suitable for apparel printing. The scene should evoke a sense of freedom, wildness, and strength. Vector art style mixed with modern illustration, highly detailed fur texture rendered abstractly, centered composition, dramatic backlighting, symmetrical negative space, ultra-clean lines, art print quality.
negative: blur, smudge, low detail, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, logo, trademark, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly rendered paws, blurry background, grainy, realistic photograph, solid color background, gradient edges
